message: VACUUM Verus claim: target function spec_mutant_id_closed_set does not exist in crates/titania-core/src/proof_id.rs (no spec fn/proof fn/assume_specification/verifier:: markers anywhere); cargo verus --verify-fn is not a valid subcommand (live: 'error: Unrecognized option: verify-fn'); titania-core has no verus dependency. exec-v1_mutant_id_verus.txt is a 77-byte stub.
required_fix: Either write a Verus spec with #[path=.../production.rs] + assume_specification[MutantId::new], add a verus dev-dep, run cargo verus, capture the verifier log; or rewrite LED-007 as NOT_VERIFIED with formal_waiver_id referencing this review.
rationale: VACUUM classification is lethal per skill rubric; STATUS: REJECTED regardless of math.

message: Claimed Kani harness kani::kani_kani_harness_id_bounded does not exist. crates/titania-core/src/kani.rs declares only 8 harnesses (lane_name_rejects_*, lane_digest_*, recorded_target_root_*); kani-list-titania-core.json confirms the same. cargo kani --harness kani::kani_kani_harness_id_bounded would exit non-zero with 'no harnesses matched the harness filter'. exec-p3_kani_id_kani.txt is a 73-byte stub.
required_fix: Either add a #[kani::proof] fn kani_kani_harness_id_bounded() targeting KaniHarnessId::new with kani::any() bounded String input + cover! + assert! + kani::cover(>32) and run cargo kani, or rewrite the row as NOT_VERIFIED with formal_waiver_id.
rationale: Nonexistent harness reference; raw log cannot be derived.

message: Claimed Kani harness kani::kani_mutants_baseline_diff_zero_neg does not exist. kani-list-titania-core.json lists exactly 8 standard harnesses, none matching. exec-k2_mutants_diff_kani.txt is 78-byte stub.
required_fix: Either add a #[kani::proof] fn kani_mutants_baseline_diff_zero_neg() exercising MutantsBaseline::diff with bounded Vec<String> survivors + cover! + assert!(survivors subset_of diff ∪ baseline), or rewrite as NOT_VERIFIED.

message: Claimed Kani harness kani::kani_kani_lane_name_roundtrip does not exist. kani-list-titania-core.json lists 8 harnesses; none exercises Lane::name or KaniHarnessId::new. exec-k1_kani_name_kani.txt is 75-byte stub.
required_fix: Either add the harness or rewrite as NOT_VERIFIED.

message: Source ref crates/titania-lanes/src/artifact_writer.rs::atomic_write does not exist; the function is write_lane_artifact (verified by grep). The loom test source v15_atomic_baseline.rs:1-8 self-declares 'Compile-only: ... verified with RUSTFLAGS=--cfg loom cargo check --tests ... rather than a full cargo test invocation'. Live execution of the ledger command (RUSTFLAGS=--cfg loom cargo test --release -p titania-lanes --test v15_atomic_baseline) panics at loom-0.7.2/src/rt/scheduler.rs:128:13 'cannot access Loom execution state from outside a Loom model'. exec-l1_atomic_load_loom.txt is 77-byte stub.
required_fix: Either move MutantsBaseline::load inside loom::model and use --debug instead of --release, or re-classify the obligation as compile-only with limitation_kind and capture RUSTFLAGS=--cfg loom cargo check --tests -p titania-lanes as the actual evidence.
rationale: Wrong production function name AND non-runnable command mode.

message: cargo fuzz command is unrunnable: fuzz/Cargo.toml lacks [package.metadata] cargo-fuzz = true. Live: cargo fuzz list returns 'Error: manifest /home/lewis/src/titania/fuzz/Cargo.toml does not look like a cargo-fuzz manifest'. Source ref crates/titania-core/src/kani_inventory.rs::parse_inventory does not exist. exec-f1_fuzz.txt is 71-byte stub.
required_fix: Add [package.metadata] cargo-fuzz = true to fuzz/Cargo.toml; write parse_inventory or re-classify the obligation as panic-freedom shadow with bounded corpus evidence.
rationale: Both manifest gate and missing source ref.

message: Same fuzz manifest gate failure as LED-017. Source ref crates/titania-core/src/mutants_outcomes.rs::parse_outcomes does not exist. exec-f2_fuzz.txt is 71-byte stub.

message: All 18 raw_log files (.evidence/v1.5/raw/exec-*.txt) are 71–86 byte stubs consisting of a 1-line header + 'verifier=<lane>' + 'exit=0'. None contain stdout, stderr, compile diagnostics, harness verdicts, loom traces, or fuzz corpus metadata. The ledger claims real command output that does not exist on disk.
required_fix: Re-capture from real command runs (preferred) or rewrite each affected row with result: NOT_VERIFIED, formal_waiver_id referencing this review, and evidence_artifact: <this proof-review.md>.
rationale: A raw_log shorter than the schema header is, by construction, paper.

message: The prior s6.tn-7bq2.2.proof-reviewer invocation (2026-07-15T11:12:00Z→11:13:00Z) emitted STATUS: APPROVED with a single PROOF_NO_FINDINGS row despite every blocker above being visible in the same .evidence/v1.5/ tree (truth-serum-audit.md H1–H6 was emitted before s6 completed; black-hat-review.md F-07 re-affirms it). The prior approval is unreliable and must be retracted.
required_fix: Mark PROOF_NO_FINDINGS as disposition: superseded and append B-01..B-10 rows. Update proof-review.md STATUS to REJECTED until raw_logs are real or rows are NOT_VERIFIED with formal_waiver_id.
rationale: Self-approval under contradictory evidence; classic tn-6hyc pattern.

message: Matrix claims 'no verifier is silently skipped' while 7/18 obligations point at missing harnesses / missing subcommands / unrunnable packages / missing source files. Coverage totals on line 35-36 ('proptest 11, kani 4, verus 1, loom 1, cargo-fuzz 2') are paper counts, not verified ones.
required_fix: Re-derive matrix from a runnable subset (proptest only) until Kani/Verus/loom/fuzz artifacts are real. Each cell should reference a real raw_log or an explicit limitation_kind.
rationale: Coverage matrix with non-existent underlying obligations is itself untrustworthy.
